title: Protean public research artifact
description: Machine-readable sidecar for one public research artifact (the JSON next to each Markdown document). Generated by galen.public_research.

generated_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp injected by the generator.

boundary.description: The verbatim boundary statement carried by every artifact.

body.description: Kind-specific structured payload. Never contains secrets, local paths, embeddings, scoring internals, or private artifact references.
